title: vicia biflora var. cossoniana
intro: Vicia biflora var. cossoniana, also known as Cosson's vetch, is a variety of flowering plant in the pea family, Fabaceae. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects, which are used to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The health benefits of Cosson's vetch include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and act as an antispasmodic, making it a popular remedy for various ailments. Cosson's vetch can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, and is also used in some traditional medicine practices.
